title: UPDATE/DELETE Semantics Verification
verified_properties: Full table UPDATE sets all rows (FULL)
Type safety: SET expressions match column types (TYPE)
sql_features_verified: UPDATE SET col = value WHERE pred
notes: Formulog Datalog program verifies UPDATE semantics using relational rules
EDB relations provide input facts; IDB relations derive consequences
Properties verified: selective update, preserved rows, type safety, atomicity
